insert into `core_news_translations` (`locale`, `origin_id`, `title`, `content`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('en', 195, 'Top 5 ideal beaches for overnight camping, little known to many.', '

Top 5 ideal beaches for overnight camping, little-known spots including Bai Goc (Phu Yen), Mui Yen (Binh Thuan), Bai Nhat (Con Dao), Lo Dieu (Binh Dinh) and Son Dung (Khanh Hoa). These are pristine coordinates with quiet spaces, clean water sources and original natural landscapes, extremely suitable for self-sufficient camping activities and soul healing.

 

Why is the trend of searching for ideal beaches for overnight camping becoming so popular?

 

In recent years, the definition of travel has changed significantly. Instead of bustling 5-star resorts, many people choose to seek out ideal beaches for overnight camping in order to rediscover balance in life. Camping by the sea is not just a trip, but a complete sensory experience: the steady sound of waves like a meditative melody, the salty sea breeze that helps cleanse your breathing, and a starry sky far from city lights that frees the mind.

 

Choosing little-known locations grants the privilege of privacy. You don't have to squeeze through crowds, there's no noise from portable speakers or chaotic commercial services. Here, there is only you, nature, and your close companions. This is the core value of "healing" travel – healing the soul through a pure connection with Mother Nature.

 

 

Discover the Top 5 little-known ideal beaches for overnight camping in 2025

 

1. Bai Goc (Phu Yen) – The rustic beauty of "The land of yellow flowers on green grass"



    • Experiencing the space: In the afternoon at Bai Goc, you may see herds of cattle leisurely grazing right by the shore or fishermen's basket boats preparing to set sail. The space here is extremely quiet, with almost no sign of tour groups.

 

    • Camping activities: The sand here is very firm, suitable for staking tents securely. You can buy fresh seafood from the nearby Hoa Hiep Trung market to bring in for a BBQ party right by the seaside. Sitting by the campfire, enjoying steamed crab and watching the lights from squid-fishing boats in the distance is an unforgettable experience.

 

    • Important note: This area has absolutely no public restrooms or fresh water services. You need to prepare 20L water containers in advance for rinsing off and daily use.



 

 

 

2. Mui Yen (Binh Thuan) – An ideal beach for overnight camping for adventure lovers



    • Natural beauty: The special feature of this ideal beach for overnight camping is its night sky. Because it lies far from residential areas and has no light pollution, Mui Yen is one of the best places in Vietnam to watch the Milky Way.

 

    • Travel route: The road to Mui Yen is quite challenging with stretches of sinking sand and rocky slopes. You should use a 4WD pickup truck or a specialized motorbike. However, once you've conquered that road, the reward is a vast, windy space that makes all the fatigue disappear.

 

    • Tent-pitching tips: Because it sits on a high rocky cliff, the wind at Mui Yen is very strong. You should absolutely not pitch your tent too close to the edge of the rocks, and you need to use large rocks to anchor around the base of the tent.



3. Bai Nhat (Con Dao) – Where time stands still amid the ocean



    • Marvelous scenery: When the tide recedes, fine white sand and smooth pebbles emerge, creating an extremely artistic scene. In the distance is Love Peak – a mountain shaped like a couple embracing, a symbol of eternity.

 

    • Healing energy: Con Dao naturally carries a very peaceful and sacred energy. Camping at Bai Nhat helps you feel the breath of the ocean most clearly. The sound of waves lapping against the pebbles creates a delightful clicking sound.

 

    • Note: You must time the tide schedule correctly to pitch your tent. Otherwise, when the water rises high in the middle of the night, the entire beach will be completely flooded.



 

 

 

4. Lo Dieu Beach (Binh Dinh) – A masterpiece of rocks and green moss reefs



    • Green moss season: If you go around the 1st to 3rd lunar month, you'll see boulders covered in a lush green moss. This is the most ideal time for camping and taking photos.

 

    • Local life: The people of Lo Dieu are extremely hospitable. You can ask to stay overnight or borrow a local's kitchen if you don't want to cook yourself. Seafood here is unusually cheap and fresh, especially the live "mực nháy" (squid) and "vu nang" snails.

 

    • Privacy: Because it's far from the center of Quy Nhon city, Lo Dieu is almost exclusively for locals and true backpackers. You'll have an entire vast beach all to yourself.



5. Son Dung Beach (Khanh Hoa) – An ideal beach for overnight camping with a strange freshwater spring



    • Peaceful space: The sea at Son Dung is calm as glass all year round, with water so clear you can see schools of fish swimming at your feet. This is truly an ideal beach for overnight camping for families who want their children to get acquainted with nature.

 

    • Special experience: Waking up early in the morning, simply step out of your tent and you'll be one of the first people to greet the sunrise at the easternmost point of the country. The feeling of watching the sun slowly rise from the ocean in an absolutely tranquil space is the most powerful medicine for healing the soul.

 

    • Support services: Here, a few households provide cooking services and kayak rentals, making your camping trip more comfortable and enjoyable.



In addition, discover many more high-quality travel experiences at Vietnamtoure.com

 

 

Essential items when camping at ideal beaches for overnight camping



    • Tent system: Choose a double-layer tent that is rainproof and well-ventilated. Don't forget to bring a tarp to line the bottom of the tent to avoid moisture seeping up from the sand.

 

    • Sleeping gear: A lightweight sleeping bag or thin blanket is essential because the temperature by the sea at 2-3 a.m. often drops very low, accompanied by the chill of dew.

 

    • Light sources: Personal flashlights, tent hanging lights, and especially a high-capacity backup light. Pristine beaches are often pitch black after sunset.

 

    • Food and drinking water: Prioritize canned or dry foods. If you bring fresh food, you'll need a specialized cooler. Bring at least 3 liters of drinking water per person per day.

 

    • First-aid kit: Painkillers, anti-diarrhea medicine, bandages, antiseptic alcohol, and especially insect repellent (because the bushes near the beach often have many mosquitoes and biting midges).



 

 

 

Tips to optimize your experience at ideal beaches for overnight camping



    • Check the weather forecast 3-5 days ahead: The sea can be very beautiful in the morning but storms may appear at night. Avoid going on days with monsoons or tropical depressions.

 

    • Check the firmness of the sand: Before pitching your tent at an ideal beach for overnight camping, try stomping hard with your foot. If the sand is too soft, you need to find another spot or use specialized sand stakes so the tent won't collapse in strong winds.

 

    • Plan your travel timing: Try to arrive at the campsite before 4 p.m. This gives you enough time to pitch the tent, gather dry firewood and prepare dinner before it gets completely dark. Pitching a tent in the dark in an unfamiliar place is no easy challenge.

 

    • Protect electronic devices: Sea salt air easily damages phones and cameras. Keep them in a waterproof bag when not in use.



 

 

 

Frequently asked questions about ideal beaches for overnight camping

 

What should you note about security when camping at little-known beaches?

 

You should notify the local authorities (border guard station or commune police) about your overnight camping. Always travel in a group and avoid bringing too much cash or expensive jewelry.

 

How do you handle personal hygiene at a pristine beach?

 

You can use a portable changing/shower tent and use specialized wet wipes for dry bathing. If you need to relieve yourself, do so far from water sources and the campsite, and dig a hole and cover it carefully according to environmental protection principles.

 

Should you make a campfire at an ideal beach for overnight camping?

 

Yes, but you must be extremely careful. Choose a sheltered spot, away from tents and dry bushes. When you leave, you must ensure the fire is completely extinguished by pouring water or covering it with a thick layer of sand.

 

Can children join beach camping?

 

Absolutely, if you choose beaches with calm waves like Son Dung or Bai Goc. However, parents need to carefully prepare personal items and medicine, and always supervise children 24/7 when near the water's edge.

 

 

LIEN MINH VIET International Trading Company Limited

 

Virenaretreat - Where Your Soul Is Healed !

 

Address: 102 My Dinh, Cau Giay, Hanoi

 

Phone: 0986662282

 

Email: support@virenaretreat.com

 

Website: virenaretreat.com

    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">4. Lo Dieu Beach (Binh Dinh) – A masterpiece of rocks and green moss reefs</span></h3>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Green moss season: If you go around the 1st to 3rd lunar month, you'll see boulders covered in a lush green moss. This is the most ideal time for camping and taking photos.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Local life: The people of Lo Dieu are extremely hospitable. You can ask to stay overnight or borrow a local's kitchen if you don't want to cook yourself. Seafood here is unusually cheap and fresh, especially the live "mực nháy" (squid) and "vu nang" snails.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Privacy: Because it's far from the center of Quy Nhon city, Lo Dieu is almost exclusively for locals and true backpackers. You'll have an entire vast beach all to yourself.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">5. Son Dung Beach (Khanh Hoa) – An ideal beach for overnight camping with a strange freshwater spring</span></h3>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Peaceful space: The sea at Son Dung is calm as glass all year round, with water so clear you can see schools of fish swimming at your feet. This is truly an ideal beach for overnight camping for families who want their children to get acquainted with nature.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Special experience: Waking up early in the morning, simply step out of your tent and you'll be one of the first people to greet the sunrise at the easternmost point of the country. The feeling of watching the sun slowly rise from the ocean in an absolutely tranquil space is the most powerful medicine for healing the soul.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Support services: Here, a few households provide cooking services and kayak rentals, making your camping trip more comfortable and enjoyable.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; color: #e74c3c; background-color: #ffffff; vertical-align: baseline;">In addition, discover many more high-quality travel experiences at</span><a href="http://vietnamtoure.com/"><span style="font-size: 13pt; color: #e74c3c; background-color: #ffffff; vertical-align: baseline;"> Vietnamtoure.com</span></a></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/top-5-bai-bien-ly-tuong-de-cam-trai-qua-dem-it-nguoi-biet-5.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Essential items when camping at ideal beaches for overnight camping</span></h2>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Tent system: Choose a double-layer tent that is rainproof and well-ventilated. Don't forget to bring a tarp to line the bottom of the tent to avoid moisture seeping up from the sand.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Sleeping gear: A lightweight sleeping bag or thin blanket is essential because the temperature by the sea at 2-3 a.m. often drops very low, accompanied by the chill of dew.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Light sources: Personal flashlights, tent hanging lights, and especially a high-capacity backup light. Pristine beaches are often pitch black after sunset.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Food and drinking water: Prioritize canned or dry foods. If you bring fresh food, you'll need a specialized cooler. Bring at least 3 liters of drinking water per person per day.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">First-aid kit: Painkillers, anti-diarrhea medicine, bandages, antiseptic alcohol, and especially insect repellent (because the bushes near the beach often have many mosquitoes and biting midges).</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/top-5-bai-bien-ly-tuong-de-cam-trai-qua-dem-it-nguoi-biet-4.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="600" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Tips to optimize your experience at ideal beaches for overnight camping</span></h2>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Check the weather forecast 3-5 days ahead: The sea can be very beautiful in the morning but storms may appear at night. Avoid going on days with monsoons or tropical depressions.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Check the firmness of the sand: Before pitching your tent at an ideal beach for overnight camping, try stomping hard with your foot. If the sand is too soft, you need to find another spot or use specialized sand stakes so the tent won't collapse in strong winds.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Plan your travel timing: Try to arrive at the campsite before 4 p.m. This gives you enough time to pitch the tent, gather dry firewood and prepare dinner before it gets completely dark. Pitching a tent in the dark in an unfamiliar place is no easy challenge.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <ul>\r\n
    <li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Protect electronic devices: Sea salt air easily damages phones and cameras. Keep them in a waterproof bag when not in use.</span></li>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    </ul>\r\n
    <p><br /><br /></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/top-5-bai-bien-ly-tuong-de-cam-trai-qua-dem-it-nguoi-biet-3.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="675" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 17pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Frequently asked questions about ideal beaches for overnight camping</span></h2>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">What should you note about security when camping at little-known beaches?</span></h3>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">You should notify the local authorities (border guard station or commune police) about your overnight camping. Always travel in a group and avoid bringing too much cash or expensive jewelry.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">How do you handle personal hygiene at a pristine beach?</span></h3>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">You can use a portable changing/shower tent and use specialized wet wipes for dry bathing. If you need to relieve yourself, do so far from water sources and the campsite, and dig a hole and cover it carefully according to environmental protection principles.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Should you make a campfire at an ideal beach for overnight camping?</span></h3>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Yes, but you must be extremely careful. Choose a sheltered spot, away from tents and dry bushes. When you leave, you must ensure the fire is completely extinguished by pouring water or covering it with a thick layer of sand.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <h3 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 14pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"><span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Can children join beach camping?</span></h3>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Absolutely, if you choose beaches with calm waves like Son Dung or Bai Goc. However, parents need to carefully prepare personal items and medicine, and always supervise children 24/7 when near the water's edge.</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><img src="/uploads/0000/1/2025/12/30/top-5-bai-bien-ly-tuong-de-cam-trai-qua-dem-it-nguoi-biet-6.jpg" alt="" width="900" height="601" /></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">LIEN MINH VIET International Trading Company Limited </span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Virenaretreat - Where Your Soul Is Healed !</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Address:</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> 102 My Dinh, Cau Giay, Hanoi</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Phone:</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> 0986662282</span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.9871999999999999; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Email:</span><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"> <a href="mailto:support@virenaretreat.com">support@virenaretreat.com</a></span></p>\r\n
    <p> </p>\r\n
    <p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Website: </span><a style="text-decoration: none;" href="http://virenaretreat.com/"> <span style="font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">virenaretreat.com</span></a></p>
